content_body: My wife and I traveled to Blue Ridge for our 25th anniversary. We chose the Mayfly Lodge due to it being a newer cabin with easy access. The cabin is great. The more we looked around, the more we were impressed by the craftsmanship of the cabin. The furnishings are comfortable and the cabin was very clean. Only regret was that we could not stay longer.
title: "Only regret was that we could not stay longer."
